scope_lock.source: Create a Customer Management spec (base_spec section 6) scoped to CRUD + balance only. Provide tenant-scoped customer records so /khach-hang stops using seed data: list/search, detail, create, update, soft delete, and read-only balance display. No transaction history, no debt/voucher management, no import/export.
in_scope: Tenant-scoped customer list with search by name/phone/code and bounded pagination
Customer detail read with contact fields, type, and read-only balance
Customer create and update with tenant isolation and validation (name required; phone as debt identifier)
Customer soft delete preserving historical references (sales, debt ledger)
Read-only display of server-derived balance; customer type enum RETAIL/FARMER/FARM/AGENT
Authenticated API client and real data wiring for /khach-hang list, detail, form, and delete
Backend unit/controller/E2E and frontend client tests covering isolation, validation, and permission denial
out_of_scope: Customer transaction/order history rendering (deferred to sales/debt specs)
Debt ledger management, payment vouchers, receivables collection, or balance mutation from this module
Opening balance / debt limit editing workflows and credit control
Import/export, bulk migration, deduplication, or merge
Advanced mode, RBAC changes, or new permission/feature namespaces

blockedBy.relationship: consumes Customer records for quick-sale and shares customer balance/debt invariants (read-only here)

design_context.discovery_reason: Simple tenant-scoped CRUD mirroring the existing suppliers/products module pattern. Customer model, enum, and permissions already exist; no schema change or transaction is required.
design_context.validation_recommended_reason: Two task files covering a non-transactional CRUD slice with no schema/migration and no money mutation; grounding and structural validation still run as the quality floor.
